title: Applicability
doc_html:
§377.3. Applicability

            This Part applies to a collaborative family law participation agreement that meets the requirements of R.S. 9:377.4 and that is signed on or after August 1, 2024.

            Acts 2024, No. 98, §1.
doc_text:
§377.3.  Applicability
This Part applies to a collaborative family law participation agreement that meets the
requirements of R.S. 9:377.4 and that is signed on or after August 1, 2024.
Acts 2024, No. 98, §1.
